ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the match */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Total wins in the match */,
  "loss" INTEGER /* Total losses in the match */,
  "margin" INTEGER /* Margin by which the match was won or lost */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the match (HOME or AWAY) */,
  "opponent_rating" REAL /* Opponent's rating based on previous performances */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match took place */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, friendly, tournament) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in-progress, completed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach of the team */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team participates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player (in cm) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in kg) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "contract_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistics belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics pertain to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the match */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player in the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location or stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., stadium, gym) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., Premier League) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Current season of the league (e.g., 2023 Season) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is held */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience officiating matches */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_referees" (
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match-referee association */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being officiated */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the platform (1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictive model used */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_outcome" TEXT /* Predicted outcome of the match */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "actual_outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the match */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
